zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Susanna Croftes於大約1574年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可格亞特 薩可哈姆時，她的父親Thomas Crofts Esquire35歲，母親Susan Poley33歲。她於大約1595年與Robert Hogben在英國英格蘭肯特萊明結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1613年在英國英格蘭肯特享年40歲。

nameMeanings.name: Croftes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Croft , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Croft
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places, for example in Lincolnshire, Lancashire, Herefordshire, and North Yorkshire, all named with Old English croft ‘small arable enclosure (normally adjoining a house)’, or a topographic name for someone who lived by a croft, from Middle English croft.
English: possibly in some cases a variant of   Craft   2.
Americanized form of German, Danish, Swedish, or Jewish   Kraft  . Compare   Kroft   and   Craft  .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

nameMeanings.name: Susanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

variants.name: Suzannah
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

variants.name: Suzanna
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Susanna Croftes was born about 1574, in Great Saxham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Crofts Esquire, was 35 and her mother, Susan Poley, was 33. She married Robert Hogben about 1595, in Lyminge, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1613, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Susanna Croftes est née environ 1574, à Great Saxham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Crofts Esquire, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Susan Poley, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Hogben environ 1595, à Lyminge, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1613, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Susanna Croftesが約1574年にイギリスイギリススフォルクグレアト サクスハムで生まれた時，父Thomas Crofts Esquireは35歳，母Susan Poleyは33歳であった。約1595年にイギリスイギリスケントリミンッジでRobert Hogbenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1613年にイギリスイギリスケントで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Susanna Croftes(이)가 대략 1574년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 그리트 사스함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Crofts Esquire(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Susan Poley(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1595년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 림잉에서 Robert Hogben(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1613년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Susanna Croftes родилась около 1574 г. в местности грит саксхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Crofts Esquire было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Susan Poley, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Hogben около 1595 г. в местности лиминг, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1613 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.
